headline: Sony’s PlayStation disc factory is already being repurposed
summary: Sony's PlayStation disc factory in Austria is being repurposed. The plant previously produced 600,000 discs daily, half for PlayStation. This signals a major shift away from physical video game media.

headline: Tesla driver faces manslaughter charges over Texas crash that killed a woman inside her home
summary: A Tesla driver faces manslaughter charges following a fatal crash in Texas. The driver, Michael Butler, claimed to be using Tesla's Full-Self Driving (FSD). His vehicle struck and killed a woman inside her home.

headline: Meta has a new app called Pocket that is absolutely nothing like the old Pocket
summary: Meta has launched a new AI-focused app named Pocket. It allows users to create and share interactive 'gizmos' built from AI prompts. This new app is distinct from Mozilla's retired 'read-it-later' Pocket.

headline: The best July 4th sales we found so far
summary: Many July 4th sales are currently underway, following the recent Prime Day event. Several familiar tech deals are still available for consumers. Retailers like Best Buy are offering notable discounts.

headline: Do You Use Your PS5 to Watch 4K Blu-ray Discs?
summary: This article queries PS5 owners about their disc usage habits. It specifically asks if they utilize the console for 4K Blu-ray playback. The piece likely explores the PS5's role as a media player.

headline: Neuroscape Is the *Other* Cyberpunk TCG, and So Far It’s Quite Fun
summary: IGN provides hands-on impressions of the new Kickstarter TCG success, Neuroscape. This cyberpunk-themed trading card game is described as quite fun. The preview offers an early look at its gameplay.

headline: Moana 3 Is in the Works, According to The Rock
summary: Dwayne 'The Rock' Johnson confirmed that Moana 3 is currently in development. This news comes directly from the voice actor of Maui. Fans can anticipate a new installment in the popular Disney franchise.

headline: 'It's Not a Comedy' — Danny McBride Details New G.I. Joe Movie, Aiming to Film in 2027
summary: Danny McBride shared initial details about his upcoming G.I. Joe movie. He explicitly stated the film will not be a comedy. Production for the project is aiming to begin in 2027.

headline: Married at First Sight UK star arrested on suspicion of rape
summary: A star from Married at First Sight UK has been arrested. The arrest is on suspicion of rape. This development follows a BBC Panorama investigation into the reality TV show.

headline: Boys who raped teen girls given custodial sentences
summary: Two teenage boys convicted of rape have now received custodial sentences. This ruling overturns initial non-custodial sentences. The decision ensures justice for the teenage girl victims.

headline: Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am for England Mexico match
summary: Pubs in England will be permitted to extend their opening hours until 5 am. This special extension is granted for the upcoming England vs. Mexico match. The government previously resisted further World Cup licensing relaxations.

headline: Taylor Swift's rumoured wedding celebrations begin with star-studded New York event
summary: Taylor Swift's rumored wedding celebrations have reportedly commenced. A star-studded event was held in New York City. Celebrities including Lena Dunham and Gigi Hadid were seen attending.
